expectations.text: Explains that origin is the user's fork and upstream is the original repository.
expectations.evidence: The response clearly defines origin as the user's fork and upstream as the original repository.

expectations.text: Recommends keeping main as a stable integration branch and doing new work on feature branches.
expectations.evidence: The response says main is the stable integration branch and that new work should go to feat/* or fix/* branches.

expectations.text: Includes a safe upstream sync flow on main using fetch plus merge.
expectations.evidence: The response gives the exact main-branch sync flow with git fetch upstream and git merge upstream/main.

expectations.text: Warns against using main as the long-lived scratch branch.
expectations.evidence: The response explicitly warns not to develop long-term directly on main.
